title: Create README.md documentation
description: Write a detailed README.md explaining how to build, install, configure, and use the agentic_ssh MCP server.

title: Fail early on sessions directory creation failure
description: In run_run_command, if std::fs::create_dir_all fails to create the sessions dir, it silently drops the error. We should report this failure early with a clear error message.

title: Implement dynamic TUI table alignment and test with long hostname
description: Update TUI layout with dynamic column width or standard 30-char width with truncation to align closing border, and add integration test with long hostname.
close_reason: Implemented dynamic Host column width, TUI table auto-growing, and ignored integration test test_connect_long_hostname

title: Implement initial agentic_ssh MCP server with SSH pool
description: Implement the SSH connection pooling and MCP server using russh and tokio, reading ~/.ssh/config for supported hosts, supporting list of hosts and executing commands
close_reason: Completed implementing initial agentic_ssh MCP server with SSH pool and output abbreviation

title: the tui doesn't always show the servers connected
description: Example, I'm doing a command on fred in one terminal, but tui shows no servers connected
close_reason: Fixed connection pool to track active operations using ActiveOperationGuard, preventing cleaner timeouts and updating TUI status

title: Implement log tailing and wait_for_log_pattern tools
description: Add tail_log, tail_container_logs, and wait_for_log_pattern tools to read logs and block until a regex pattern is matched remotely
close_reason: Completed implementing tail_log, tail_container_logs, and wait_for_log_pattern tools with regex and timeout support

title: Escape shell parameters in MCP tools to prevent command injection
description: Escape/sanitize remote parameters (e.g. file_path, container) in tail_log, tail_container_logs, and wait_for_log_pattern to ensure they are secure against command injection.
close_reason: Successfully implemented shell escaping for file_path and container parameters in tail_log, tail_container_logs, and wait_for_log_pattern tools.

title: Implement prepared statements for SSH tools
description: Implement SQL-Style Prepared Statements for SSH to restrict execution to predefined, parameterized commands.
close_reason: Implemented prepared statements for SSH tools

title: Implement TUI status subcommand and state writing
description: Write pool status to pool_status.json and implement a tui subcommand in main.rs to display active connections.
close_reason: Completed implementing TUI dashboard and state updates

title: Implement Unix timestamps in status and daemon liveness check
description: Change status file to store absolute last_used Unix timestamps and make TUI calculate elapsed/remaining times live, with a daemon liveness check.
close_reason: Completed implementing dynamic Unix timestamps in TUI and daemon liveness checks

title: Prevent temp log file collisions for concurrent MCP tool runs
description: MCP query tools (stats, ports, process search, etc.) currently use a static temp file path (agentic_ssh_temp.log) which causes conflicts when running concurrently. Generate unique temp log files per execution.
close_reason: Defined and exported make_temp_log_path helper function in mod.rs and tools.rs. Every synchronous query tool now runs in a host-unique collision-free temp log path, which is deleted immediately after execution completes.

title: Implement search_processes tool
description: Add search_processes tool to filter remote process lists using regex and return structured JSON to save tokens
close_reason: Completed implementing search_processes tool with regex and structured JSON outputs

title: Fix TUI update and screen clearing
description: Make background task update status file every second and flush stdout in TUI loop to prevent trailing prints.
close_reason: Completed fixing TUI updating live status and stdout flushing

title: Remove hardcoded status file path
description: Make pool_status.json path configurable via AGENTIC_SSH_POOL_STATUS env variable and load it from .env
close_reason: Completed removing hardcoded path and integrating dotenvy
